title: Implications: Predictive Horizon for Millennium Problems

RH.why: RH zeros = EML-3 (oscillatory zeros at σ=1/2); shadow = EML-3 (confirmed S171, S258)

prediction.interpretation: Any RH proof must engage EML-3 structure (complex oscillation)

PNP.why: P/NP = combinatorial separation: circuit objects = EML-0, lower bounds = EML-2 (S286)

prediction.interpretation: P≠NP proof must use EML-2 methods (probabilistic, counting)
prediction.barrier: Natural proofs barrier = EML-0 circuits resist EML-2 approximation (S286)
prediction.proof_method_prediction: Novel EML-2 lower bound bypassing natural proofs barrier

YM.why: Yang-Mills: classical action EML-2; quantum path integral EML-3; gap = confinement

prediction.interpretation: Mass gap proof must bridge EML-2 (classical action) and EML-3 (quantum oscillation)
prediction.proof_method_prediction: Rigorous construction of EML-2→EML-3 quantum map with mass gap

NS.why: NS blow-up shadow=2 (BKM criterion = vorticity integral = EML-2, S238)

prediction.interpretation: Regularity proof (or blow-up example) must be EML-2
prediction.proof_method_prediction: EML-2 energy estimates or EML-2 vorticity concentration proof

BSD.why: BSD: arithmetic rank(EML-2) = analytic order(EML-3): Langlands-type (S266)

prediction.interpretation: BSD proof = equating EML-2 (arithmetic) and EML-3 (analytic)
prediction.proof_method_prediction: Explicit Langlands functor from L-function(EML-3) to rank(EML-2)

Hodge.why: Hodge: algebraic cycles(EML-2) inside Hodge classes(EML-3, complex cohomology)

prediction.interpretation: Hodge proof = construct EML-2 algebraic cycle from EML-3 Hodge class
prediction.proof_method_prediction: Algebraic geometry functor from Hodge(EML-3) to cycles(EML-2)

analysis.meta_verdict: Shadow Depth Theorem predicts proof method: shadow=2 → EML-2 tools; shadow=3 → spectral/oscillatory; shadow={2,3} → Langlands-type bridge

key_theorem: Millennium Shadow Catalog (S309): The Shadow Depth Theorem predicts the required proof method for each Millennium problem. RH: shadow=3 → proof must engage spectral/oscillatory EML-3 structure. P≠NP: shadow=2 → proof must be EML-2 (probabilistic lower bound). Yang-Mills mass gap: shadow={2,3} → Langlands-type proof bridging EML-2 and EML-3. Navier-Stokes: shadow=2 → energy/vorticity estimates (EML-2). BSD: shadow={2,3} → Langlands functor from L-function(EML-3) to rank(EML-2). Hodge: shadow={2,3} → algebraic geometry functor from Hodge(EML-3) to cycles(EML-2). PATTERN: shadow=2 → analytic/probabilistic; shadow=3 → spectral; shadow={2,3} → Langlands bridge.
rabbit_hole_log: RH: shadow=3 (oscillatory zeros); proof method = spectral EML-3 operator
P≠NP: shadow=2 (lower bounds = EML-2); proof method = new EML-2 technique
Yang-Mills: shadow={2,3} (Langlands-type); mass gap = EML-2↔EML-3 bridge
NS: shadow=2 (BKM = EML-2); proof = EML-2 energy/vorticity
BSD + Hodge: shadow={2,3} = Langlands functor required for both
